data.title: China's military land vehicle electronic market to grow with a CAGR of 4.5% from 2025 to 2031, driven by technological innovations and defense spending.
data.description: A report on the "Military Land Vehicle Electronic Market in China" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It is projected that the global market for military land vehicle electronics will experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.5% between 2025 and 2031. Specifically focusing on China, significant growth is anticipated in their military land vehicle electronic sector during the forecast period. Key factors contributing to this growth include continual technological advancements in the military industry, an increase in defense expenditures, and significant opportunities for market expansion.

data.title: Exxe Group CEO Eduard Nazmiev shares revenue projections of $15.0-15.7 million for Quarter ending Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming, Eduard Nazmiev, Ph.D., CEO of Exxe Group (OTC: AXXA), addressed shareholders in a letter. Exxe Group (OTC: AXXA) has undergone a successful operating model transformation. The company projects a revenue range of $15.0-15.7 million for the Quarter ending December 31, 2025. Previously, Exxe generated revenues from asset ownership, but now operates a revenue-focused platform offering services, technology, and management.

data.title: Informatica named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools for 20 years. Recognized for 12 years on Completeness of Vision axis.
data.description: Informatica from Salesforce, a prominent enterprise specializing in AI-powered cloud data management, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools. This marks the 12th consecutive year that Informatica has been recognized as a Leader, with Gartner also ranking them highest on the Completeness of Vision axis. According to Gartner’s projections, by 2027, there will be a significant adoption of AI assistants and AI-optimized processes within the realm of data integration.

data.title: Smart Meter and eClinicalWorks have doubled RPM adoption in 2025 with over 25,000 active devices used by eCW providers.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, Smart Meter, a top provider of Cellular RPM™ and a trusted source of patient-generated vital health data, revealed significant progress in its collaboration with eClinicalWorks, a leading AI-powered ambulatory EHR platform in the US. In 2025, this partnership resulted in a remarkable 107% surge in active Smart Meter devices utilized by eClinicalWorks (eCW) providers, exceeding 25,000 active devices presently in use.

data.title: SEC's Crenshaw to tackle crypto before leaving: Last Democrat to exit in Jan, 18 mos post term end.
data.description: Caroline Crenshaw, the only Democratic commissioner at the financial agency, is set to leave in January, 18 months past the conclusion of her official term.

data.title: Serensia by Quadient platform gets final accreditation from French Tax Authority, ready for September 2026 reform.
data.description: Quadient's Serensia platform has successfully obtained full certification from the French authority DGFiP, marking a crucial milestone in compliance. The platform is now officially approved to meet the requirements set for the September 2026 reform. This certification underscores the platform's readiness for the upcoming changes, solidifying its position as a trusted solution for organizations.
Kering reports financial data on reclassification of Kering Beauté as per IFRS 5.

data.title: SPIE to acquire 93% of French digital transformation expert Artemys in agreement signed in December 2025.
data.description: On December 11th, 2025, SPIE, the top independent multi-technical services provider in Europe for energy infrastructure and communications, revealed its plans to purchase a majority stake of 93% in Artemys, a renowned French company specializing in digital transformation services.
BLS: December US PPI To Be Released On January 30

data.title: Fivetran recognized as a Challenger in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools, reflects innovation.
data.description: Fivetran, a data movement company based in Oakland, California, has recently been honored as a Challenger in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools. In this market, which involves platforms that facilitate the merging of data from various origins and the execution of activities related to data access, transformation, enrichment, and distribution, Fivetran has made significant progress. This acknowledgment highlights the company's ongoing commitment to innovation in providing data integration solutions.

data.title: SOGECLAIR reports voting rights as of 11/30/2025, with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros. Company contact: +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71.
data.description: SOGECLAIR, a business corporation based in Blagnac, France, operates with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros. The company's contact information includes their address at 7 avenue Albert Durand, telephone number +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71, and website www.sogeclair.com. They are registered under the number 335 218 269 at the Trade and Companies Register of Toulouse.
